Name: Faith That Moves Mountains (Ebook)
Short Description: All Things Are Possible All throughout the Bible, we see Jesus praying very short prayers, sometimes only a few words, yet He always got instant and incredible results. Name: Uprooting Every Demonic Prophecy (Deliverance Series Vol. 12) (EBOOK)
Victory Over the Spirit of Humiliation & Oppression (Deliverance Series Vol. 1) (EBOOK)
Description:
Powerful Midnight Prayers For Total Deliverance, Healing and Breakthrough. Overcome Depression, Fear, Anxiety & Other Mentally Crippling Disorders.

Have you been suffering from oppression lately? Have feelings of depression, loneliness and confusion been sweeping over you? Has life seem to have lost its meaning? Do you often feel scattered in your thoughts and find it hard to stay focused for long?

Then you need the prayers in this book.

These sixteen prayer points will enable you to come out of every ongoing depression that have paralyzed your life. They will make you feel better about yourself, you will feel more hopeful, you will feel joy returning to you.

These prayer points will destroy every fear that wants to keep you in slavery and mental prison. You will come out of every financial slavery, every bodily slavery.

Sixteen Prayer Points For Victory over Every Spirit of Humiliation & Oppression will break those bondages out of your life for good. You will learn how to identify whether or not you are under demonic oppression and how to come out of it.  You will discover the major signs of this spirit working in your life, and you will receive strategic prayer points for you to use to overcome it. This book is sure to bring you the deliverance you need so you can start living the abundant life God has for you. Is there a career you are dreaming of, a marriage or a future you are dreaming of? Do you often think what your life could be like if not for your current issues? Does it all seem out of your reach? Do you ever sleep at night and feel as though something is sitting on you preventing you from getting up, feeling as though you can hardly breathe, as though you might die? THE SPIRIT OF HUMILIATION & OPPRESSION was the reason why the children of Israel were enslaved for 400 years. That spirit held them down; they were unable to break free until their deliverer came. But you will use these prayer points to come out of every slavery. In this self Deliverance prayer book you will learn....the fifteen major signs of the spirit of humiliation and oppression including heaviness, depression and chronic weariness, how a creator of Playstation video games was sentenced to solitude, how a member of the royal family suddenly retired and hid in his house, what you can do right away to start taking back control of your life.

In Sixteen Prayer Points For Victory over Every Spirit of Humiliation & Oppression you will:

Learn how to put on the full armor of God before you pray

Take authority over the powers of darkness

Break every form of oppression in your working place, home, family, body and finances

Destroy every yoke of bondage from your life

Learn how to seal your deliverance

Get this book now - It's Time To Be Free!

Name: How To Unblock Your Dreams (Ebook)
Short Description:
Many times, people dream dreams only to wake up and not remember them. Others dream dreams which are completely contrary to the destiny that God has for them. Both of these have serious consequences to them. God uses dreams to communicate, to give instruction, to warn against upending danger. But when your dreams are blocked and you cant remember them, you miss out on those instructions and warnings. You miss out on what God is trying to speak to you. Whats worse, when the enemy has infiltrated your dream life, he plants things without you knowing. But in How To Unblock Your Dreams, youll discover
  • The importance of remembering your dreams
  • How the enemy uses your dreams against you
  • The special ingredient to unblock your dreams
God wants to communicate with you but first we must unblock your dreams. Its time to start benefitting from your dreams.

Name: How To Overcome The Demon Of Nightmares (Jinn Kabus) MIDNIGHT PROMO
Description: INTRODUCING ... The Brand New Series "Exposing Jinn" There is a spirit that is responsible for bringing the mighty down. It can break a mighty person, slowly by slowly, until there is no more greatness left in them. Job spoke about it, When I say, My bed shall comfort me, my couch shall ease my complaint, Then You scare me with dreams and terrify me through visions, So that I would choose strangling and death rather than these my bones. (Job 7:13-15) Genie Kabus is the demon responsible for nightmares. It will cause you to have constant dreams of people chasing you, fighting you, where you wake up with your heart pounding. Other times it can pin you down where you feel like you can't breathe. It is responsible for causing different ailments and trauma; things that keep you from resting properly. It can even work through others in your home, your family members or children. But the reason why this genie is so dangerous is because of what happens to your body when you don't sleep properly. God created the night for man to rest. During that time is when your body goes into recovery mode; it works to repair itself. But when you are not sleeping properly because of nightmares or other issues, your body begins to slowly break down. It's not something that happens overnight, but little by little it weakens you. Before you know you are not the man or the woman you once were. It causes premature aging; it causes your bones to weaken. If you are always being disturbed in your sleep, waking up with aches and pains so that you don't get a proper night's rest, you need to be delivered from genie kabus. Sometimes especially when someone you have been involved with in the past wants to punish you, they assign genie kabus to work on you on a longer run to destroy your latter days. It can attack your spouse or your partner so that you end up fighting all night long and you don't get any sleep. It's designed to weaken you through tormenting your mind, your body, so that it doesn't get a chance to repair itself. It can even attack your children so that you spend all night taking care of them. The key point is it weakens you through lack of sleep. But I declare into your life, the days of you getting attacked at night are over. This year there must be peace. Every genie kabus that wants to weaken your body and your life through torment, through nightmares, we command it to die by fire! Get Your Copy Today And Get Rid Of This Demon Once & For All!

Description: In a world of treachery and power, can love truly rise from the ashes? Duty, loyalty, and the weight of leadership hang over David, while Abigail must face the shadows of her past and the expectations placed upon her. Can their love survive the fires of betrayal, war, and societal judgment? Or will the forces of their world tear them apart before they can realize the promise of their love? "Through Faith & Fire: The Love Story of David & Abigail" is an unforgettable tale of passion, destiny, and resilience. In the heart of ancient Israel, two souls are bound by fate, tested by fire, and forged together by a love that transcends the ages. WHY YOU NEED THIS BOOK NOW

  • Because waiting is costing you time and opportunity. Every day you hesitate is a day lost. Your time is now.

  • Because your future is too important to ignore. Stop settling—it’s time to step into the life you were destined for.

This is more than just a book—it’s your wake-up call. A roadmap to transformation. A guide to reclaiming the success, joy, and fulfillment that already belongs to you.

No more excuses. No more delays. No more living in regret.

Your second chance is here. Are you ready to take it?

Don’t wait. Don’t doubt. The life you’ve been dreaming of is waiting for you—but you must take the first step. Turn the page and claim your breakthrough today.

Before you know you are not the man or the woman you once were. It causes premature aging; it causes your bones to weaken. If you are always being disturbed in your sleep, waking up with aches and pains so that you don't get a proper night's rest, you need to be delivered from genie kabus. Sometimes especially when someone you have been involved with in the past wants to punish you, they assign genie kabus to work on you on a longer run to destroy your latter days. It can attack your spouse or your partner so that you end up fighting all night long and you don't get any sleep. It's designed to weaken you through tormenting your mind, your body, so that it doesn't get a chance to repair itself. It can even attack your children so that you spend all night taking care of them. The key point is it weakens you through lack of sleep. But I declare into your life, the days of you getting attacked at night are over. This year there must be peace. Every genie kabus that wants to weaken your body and your life through torment, through nightmares, we command it to die by fire! Get Your Copy Today And Get Rid Of This Demon Once & For All!

Description: In a world where hope seems lost, Ruth, a Moabite widow, follows her heart and her mother-in-law, Naomi, back to Bethlehem, seeking refuge in a land filled with uncertainty. Before you know you are not the man or the woman you once were. It causes premature aging; it causes your bones to weaken. If you are always being disturbed in your sleep, waking up with aches and pains so that you don't get a proper night's rest, you need to be delivered from genie kabus. Sometimes especially when someone you have been involved with in the past wants to punish you, they assign genie kabus to work on you on a longer run to destroy your latter days. It can attack your spouse or your partner so that you end up fighting all night long and you don't get any sleep. It's designed to weaken you through tormenting your mind, your body, so that it doesn't get a chance to repair itself. It can even attack your children so that you spend all night taking care of them. The key point is it weakens you through lack of sleep. But I declare into your life, the days of you getting attacked at night are over. This year there must be peace. Every genie kabus that wants to weaken your body and your life through torment, through nightmares, we command it to die by fire! Get Your Copy Today And Get Rid Of This Demon Once & For All!

Name: 30 Days to Handle Difficult People Without Losing Your Mind: How To Master Calm Conversations, End Toxic Cycles, and Build Respectful Relationships
Category: 30 Day Series|Deliverance & Spiritual Warfare|E-books|Personal Growth & Confidence|Productivity & Purpose|Relationships|Relationships & Social Success|Spiritual Growth
Featured Image Alt Text: 30 Days To Handle Difficult People Without Losing Your Mind
Short Description:
You weren’t born to live on edge.
But when you're constantly dodging manipulation, walking on eggshells, or bracing for the next emotional blow-up, life becomes exhausting.

Whether it's a boss who bullies, a family member who guilt-trips, or a partner who just won’t listen—dealing with difficult people can steal your peace, drain your joy, and leave you second-guessing your worth.

But it doesn’t have to be this way.

You can reclaim your voice. Protect your peace. And handle anyone—with wisdom, confidence, and calm.

In 30 Days to Handle Difficult People Without Losing Your Mind, Dr. Climate Wiseman gives you a day-by-day roadmap to take back control of your emotions, responses, and environment. Through practical strategies, real-life examples, and deep emotional healing tools, you’ll learn how to stop the toxic cycles—for good.

In just 30 days, you’ll discover how to:

  • Respond without reacting—and stay calm under pressure

  • Set healthy boundaries without guilt or fear

  • Disarm manipulation and passive-aggression in real time

  • Lead with influence, even without authority

  • Protect your mental and emotional space while staying true to your values

  • Rebuild respect in strained relationships—or release them with grace

This book doesn’t just teach communication—it teaches emotional mastery.

This book is for you if you’ve ever said:

  • “I’m tired of being the bigger person.”

  • “They never listen, no matter how I say it.”

  • “Why do I always end up feeling crazy or guilty?”

  • “I want peace—but I don’t want to be a doormat.”

  • “I don’t want to keep losing sleep over this.”

It’s time to stop surviving around difficult people—and start thriving in spite of them.
With each chapter, you’ll grow stronger, clearer, and more unshakably YOU.

The peace you’ve been longing for is just 30 days away. Are you ready to embrace it?

Name: How to Build a Powerful Home Altar That Speaks, Protects & Releases Heaven’s Power in Your Daily Life
Category: 30 Day Series|Deliverance & Spiritual Warfare|E-books|Spiritual Empowerment|Spiritual Growth
Featured Image Alt Text: How To Build A Powerful Home Altar
Short Description:
You were never meant to live in a powerless house.

In the battles of life—whether they show up as delays, strange sicknesses, rebellious children, financial limitation, or spiritual confusion—God never intended for you to fight empty-handed. He designed a system, both ancient and prophetic, where Heaven responds to earth through the power of an altar.

The home altar is not just a piece of furniture or a sacred corner—it’s a spiritual technology. A divine access point. A place where your sacrifices speak louder than your enemies’ accusations. A prophetic gate where heaven meets your household and where fire is kindled daily to protect, direct, and empower you.

In church, there is a central altar where corporate power is released. But what happens when the warfare follows you home? When you feel spiritually attacked in the night? When your children are under siege? When something unseen is choking your progress—yet you’ve been praying, fasting, tithing, and nothing seems to shift?

That’s where the home altar comes in.

This book is a 28-chapter prophetic and practical journey to teach you:

  • How to build, dedicate, and protect your personal home altar

  • How to connect your home altar to your church altar for multiplied effect

  • How to activate divine protocols using oil, water, communion, prayer, and sacrifice

  • How to guard your altar from defilement and strange fire

  • How to release prophetic fire that speaks louder than any curse, witchcraft, or legal accusation

  • How to raise family altars that cover your children, restore marriages, and secure legacy

  • And ultimately, how to become a walking altar yourself—carrying divine presence and power wherever you go

This is not just about setting up a sacred place—it’s about unlocking divine patterns and supernatural systems that govern victories, covenant, restoration, and legacy.

Throughout these 28 chapters, you’ll also discover:

✅ Hidden biblical secrets from Abraham, Elijah, David, and Jesus
✅ Real-life testimonies of breakthrough and deliverance from believers around the world
✅ Prophetic activations to anoint your home, break generational cycles, and recover stolen blessings
✅ Step-by-step guides for cleansing, rededication, and aligning your altar with God’s timing

Who Is This Book For?

This book is for the spiritual warrior who is tired of recycled battles.
It’s for the prayerful mother who wants to secure her children’s destiny.
It’s for the business owner who senses invisible resistance.
It’s for the prophetic intercessor, the pastor, the home leader, the frustrated believer who feels like something spiritual is “off”—and is finally ready to fix it.

A Word from the Author

For over two decades, I’ve seen firsthand how altars rule outcomes.
Some people’s lives are blocked because of evil altars in their bloodline. Others struggle because their altar at home is silent, defiled, or never existed. But when the right altar is raised and honored properly—miracles happen. I’ve seen barrenness end, marriages restored, finances explode, curses reversed, and demons silenced.

In How to Build a Powerful Home Altar, I’ll walk you step-by-step through this sacred yet practical process. Whether you’re new to this or deeply seasoned, this book will equip you to experience God’s presence, power, and prophetic guidance like never before.

Are you ready to build an altar that speaks louder than any attack?

Then let’s begin.

—
Dr. Climate Wiseman
www.prophetclimate.co.uk
www.deliverancecoach.com

Name: Multiply the Vision: A Practical Guide to Equipping Leaders Who Make Disciples
Category: Church Building|Church Leadership|Personal Growth & Confidence|Spiritual Empowerment|Spiritual Growth
Featured Image Alt Text: Multiply The Vision
Short Description:
Are you ready to move beyond maintenance into true multiplication?

The Kingdom Temple isn’t called to be just another gathering place.
It is a spiritual stronghold where captives are set free and disciples are planted to flourish.

But this vision can’t be fulfilled by passive spectators or reluctant helpers.
It demands committed, equipped, and on-fire leaders who know how to reproduce themselves over and over.

This manual is your blueprint for that kind of leadership.
It will challenge you, train you, and transform you—moving you from simply serving to truly multiplying.

Inside you’ll discover:

  • How to conquer fear, laziness, offense, and hidden sin

  • How to invite, disciple, and train others to lead

  • How to build accountability, sustain personal revival, and prioritize God’s mission

  • How to create a culture of discipleship that reproduces for generations

If you’re tired of watching church growth stall at programs and events…
If you’re burdened to see real lives changed, families restored, and your city impacted…
If you’re willing to pay the price to become the kind of leader God can trust with souls…

This book is your call to arms.

It’s time to take ownership.
It’s time to make disciples who make disciples.
It’s time to see The Kingdom Temple become everything God intended:
A place where the captives are set free, and all disciples are planted to flourish.

Answer the call. Multiply the mission. Change the world.

Name: 30 Days to Break the Wandering Spirit and Nomadic Curse: Break Free from Generational Instability and Claim God’s Promise of Settlement
Category: 30 Day Series|E-books|Personal Growth & Confidence|Productivity & Purpose|Spiritual Empowerment|Spiritual Growth
Featured Image Alt Text: 30 Days to Break the Wandering Spirit and Nomadic Curse
Short Description:
Are you tired of feeling like you never truly belong anywhere?

Have you spent too long moving from place to place, wrestling with eviction notices, broken leases, family betrayal, and a constant fear of never having a home to call your own?

Does your soul feel restless? Are you exhausted by instability that seems to follow you, no matter how hard you try?

You’re not imagining it. You’re not cursed to live like this forever.

There is a spiritual root behind these patterns—a Wandering Spirit and Nomadic Curse that has plagued generations.

But you can break it.

This book is your 30-day guide to freedom.

Through proven deliverance strategies and powerful daily lessons, you will:

✅ Identify the spiritual roots of forced wandering and eviction cycles.
✅ Break ancestral agreements and soul ties enforcing instability.
✅ Cleanse and anoint your home to establish spiritual boundaries.
✅ Declare God’s promise of ownership, rest, and generational blessing.
✅ Build a lifestyle that secures your freedom and teaches your children stability.

Imagine 30 days from now:

  • Waking up in a home filled with God’s peace.

  • Watching your children thrive without fear of sudden moves.

  • No longer carrying the shame of lost property or broken leases.

  • Confidently declaring, “This is our home. We are settled by God’s promise.”

This book isn’t just theory—it’s a step-by-step manual of deliverance and transformation.

Inside you’ll find daily teachings, journal prompts, powerful declarations, targeted prayer points, and real-life testimonies from people around the world who have broken free from the same curse you face today.

You’ll be guided gently but powerfully, with the wisdom of Dr. Climate Wiseman’s 25+ years of deliverance ministry experience.

This book is for you if:

  • You’re tired of moving, renting, and losing everything you build.

  • Your family has a history of eviction, betrayal, or land disputes.

  • You fear commitment, ownership, or planting roots.

  • You feel spiritually restless and unable to settle.

  • You want your children to inherit stability, not struggle.

  • You believe God has more for you—a place of peace, ownership, and blessing.

It’s time to end the cycle.
It’s time to break the curse.
The peace you’ve been longing for is just 30 days away—are you ready to embrace it?

Featured Image Alt Text: 30 Days To Negotiation Mastery
Short Description:
What if the reason you’re stuck isn’t bad luck—but bad negotiation?

Every missed opportunity, broken relationship, or underpaid contract… at the root of it all is one silent skill: negotiation.Most people are losing—not because they lack potential, but because they never learned how to negotiate with confidence, clarity, and courage.

Name: 30 Days to Annihilate Evil Altars of Jealousy: Destroy Envy, Unlock Divine Favor, and Walk in Unstoppable Breakthrough
Featured Image Alt Text: 30 Days to Annihilate Evil Altars of Jealousy
Short Description:
Are you tired of fighting invisible battles?
Do you feel overlooked, sabotaged, or rejected for no clear reason? Behind many closed doors and delayed promises lies a silent killer—jealousy.

Whether it’s from family, friends, coworkers, or even fellow believers, envy can raise deadly spiritual altars that block your favor, steal your peace, and hold your destiny hostage.

But here’s the truth: you don’t have to stay trapped.

In this 30-day prophetic journey, Master Prophet Climate Wiseman takes you by the hand and walks you through daily deliverance, healing, and restoration. Using decades of experience in spiritual warfare and breakthrough, he equips you with powerful tools to identify, dismantle, and destroy every evil altar of jealousy working against your life.

Through prophetic insights, powerful prayer strategies, and real-life testimonies from around the world, you’ll learn to:

  • Recognize the hidden roots of jealousy in relationships, ministry, and the workplace

  • Shut down spiritual spies and monitoring spirits assigned to derail your calling

  • Break word curses, soul ties, and emotional trauma rooted in envy

  • Rebuild your self-worth and reclaim divine favor over your life

  • Anoint your future and walk confidently into generational breakthrough

This book is your daily warfare guide—anointed, strategic, and healing. Each day includes prophetic declarations, guided prayers, reflective prompts, and action steps to secure your freedom for good.

This book is for you if…

  • You’ve ever been betrayed by someone who once celebrated you

  • You’ve felt blocked, hindered, or slowed down after sudden success

  • You sense envy from loved ones but don’t know how to respond spiritually

  • You feel emotionally drained, anxious, or under attack for no visible reason

  • You’re ready to reclaim your destiny and rise above every form of jealousy

You were never meant to live under the shadow of envy.
You were born to walk in the light of divine favor.

The peace, clarity, and restoration you’ve been longing for is just 30 days away.
Are you ready to walk into it?

Name: 30 Days to Fight for Your Marriage: Spiritual Warfare Strategies to Stand in the Gap, Break Demonic Resistance, and Restore Covenant Love

Short Description:
What do you do when you're the only one fighting for your marriage?

The silence is heavy. The rejection stings. The spiritual warfare is real—and it feels like you're standing on a battlefield all by yourself.

If you're exhausted from crying yourself to sleep, drained from trying to keep the family together, and frustrated by a spouse who has grown cold, distant, or even hostile… this book was written for you.

You are not powerless. You are not alone.

In these 30 transformational days, you will learn how to:

  • Take spiritual authority over your marriage—even if your spouse is spiritually disengaged or resistant.

  • Restore peace, unity, and intimacy through prophetic intercession, fasting, and targeted declarations.

  • Hear from God clearly about your marriage and follow His instruction with confidence.

  • Heal your own heart from betrayal, silence, and emotional abandonment.

  • Release angels, speak destiny, and reclaim your home as a place of divine order and restoration.

Every day includes deep spiritual teaching, guided journal prompts, action steps, prophetic affirmations, powerful declarations, and real-life testimonies from people just like you—who fought alone and won.

This is your 30-day battle plan to win the unseen war, reclaim your identity, and welcome covenant love back into your life.

This book is for you if:

  • You feel spiritually or emotionally abandoned in your marriage

  • Your spouse is cold, disconnected, or actively rejecting you

  • You suspect spiritual warfare is behind your marital struggles

  • You've prayed, cried, and fasted—but haven’t seen change

  • You’re ready to stop surviving and start fighting—God’s way

You were never meant to fight alone.

Let this book become your war room manual.
The peace you’ve been longing for is just 30 days away—are you ready to embrace it?

Name: 30 Days to Become a Mantled Man: From Dust to Dominion: Discover Identity, Authority, and Legacy Outside the Garden
Featured Image Alt Text: 30 Days to Become a Mantled Man
Short Description:
You weren’t born in the garden—but you were born to rule in it.

Have you ever felt like you missed your moment? Like life started without you? Like you were left out of something you were supposed to inherit?

You’re not alone.

Many men feel the weight of invisible expectations, buried pain, and a silent question echoing in their soul: "What happened to me?" This book is your prophetic blueprint to answer that cry—and rise into your God-given mantle.

In just 30 days, you’ll go from broken to built, from wandering to ruling.

Through deep, soul-stirring teachings and daily activations, 30 Days to Become a Mantled Man leads you through the real formation process every man must undergo before he can carry authority. Inspired by the creation and calling of Adam, this journey confronts your dust, awakens your identity, and prepares you for dominion.

This book is for you if you:

• Feel called by God but constantly face invisible resistance
• Know there’s more to your life, but struggle to find direction
• Battle passivity, shame, rejection, or emotional isolation
• Want to walk in spiritual authority without losing humility
• Are tired of cycles and ready for legacy
• Desire to lead your home, business, and generation with vision

Inside you’ll discover:

• Why men are formed outside the blessing—and what that means
• How to confront the serpent before your marriage or mission
• What it means to carry the Watchman’s Mantle
• How to protect the blessing without losing the blueprint
• What true priesthood and kingship look like
• How to build for generations you’ll never meet

This is not just a book—it’s a calling, a mantle, and a mirror. Every word is written with fire, compassion, and prophetic precision by Dr. Climate Wiseman, who has mentored thousands of men into breakthrough.

You don’t need to have it all together.
You just need to start with dust—and say yes to the formation.

The peace, purpose, and power you’ve been waiting for are just 30 days away. Are you ready to embrace it?

Name: Kingdom Event Management: A Step-by-Step Manual for Vision-Driven, Spirit-Led, and Professionally Executed Ministry Events
Featured Image Alt Text: Kingdom Event Management
Short Description:
Your calling is to serve the King.
Your mission is to prepare the way.
Your events are the runway for God’s glory.

But right now, event ministry may feel more like stress than success.
Deadlines pile up. Details get missed. Volunteers lose motivation.
You pour your heart into the work, but you’re left wondering: “Is this really making the impact God intended?”

It doesn’t have to be this way.

Kingdom Event Management is your complete blueprint for creating ministry events that are deeply spiritual, beautifully organised, and executed with excellence—without burning out or losing sight of the real mission.

Drawing from biblical examples, over two decades of ministry leadership, and real-world case studies, this manual will help you:

  • Build a clear, Spirit-led vision for every event.

  • Develop stress-free planning systems that actually work.

  • Coordinate volunteers, departments, and resources with unity.

  • Create a powerful spiritual atmosphere through prayer, worship, and preparation.

  • Handle crisis moments with grace and confidence.

  • Leave a lasting legacy of excellence for future leaders.

This book is for you if…

  • You lead or serve on a church event management team.

  • You’re a pastor, ministry leader, or volunteer looking for structure and clarity.

  • You want to merge biblical wisdom with professional event skills.

  • You desire events that touch lives and glorify God—not just fill a calendar.

  • You believe that excellence in preparation creates room for the miraculous.

Whether you’re planning a small fellowship dinner or a major conference, this manual will equip you to serve with confidence, inspire your team, and host events that become unforgettable Kingdom moments.

The excellence you’ve been reaching for is within your grasp.
The transformation your church needs is within your plan.
The Kingdom is waiting. Are you ready to prepare the way?

Name: Kingdom Service Coordinator: A Step-By-Step Manual For Order, Excellence, and People Skills in Ministry
Featured Image Alt Text: Kingdom Service Coordinator
Short Description:
When God’s house is in order, His presence flows freely.
But when disorder creeps in, even the most anointed service can be disrupted.

If you’ve ever felt the pressure of keeping a church service on track — balancing the needs of the pastor, the congregation, and multiple ministry teams — you know the weight of this calling. The stress, the last-minute crises, the difficult personalities… they can leave you drained, frustrated, and wondering if you’re truly making a difference.

This book was written to change that.

Drawing on over 30 years of pastoral and leadership experience, Bishop Climate Wiseman reveals the spiritual, practical, and relational keys to becoming an outstanding Church Service Coordinator. You’ll learn not just how to manage a service but how to lead with grace, authority, and humility — creating an atmosphere where the Holy Spirit can move without distraction.

Through this step-by-step guide, you will:

  • Discover how to maintain order without being overbearing.

  • Master the people skills that win hearts and build trust.

  • Develop the ability to “read the room” and respond with wisdom.

  • Learn how to adapt to change without losing control.

  • Build a legacy of excellence that outlasts your time in the role.

This isn’t just a manual — it’s a mentor in book form, filled with proven strategies, biblical wisdom, and practical insights to help you thrive in one of the most important, yet often unseen, ministries in the church.

This book is for you if…

  • You are currently serving as a Church Service Coordinator or aspire to.

  • You are a pastor or leader training your team for greater excellence.

  • You often feel overwhelmed by the responsibility of keeping services in order.

  • You want to grow in your ability to work with all kinds of people.

  • You believe that order, respect, and excellence matter in God’s house.

The peace, confidence, and joy you’ve been longing for in your role are within reach.
It’s time to step into your calling with clarity, skill, and a heart full of grace.

Order. Excellence. People Skills.
Your ministry starts here.

Name: The King and the Hourglass: Building a Legacy That Outlives You
Category: Personal Growth & Confidence|Productivity & Purpose|Spiritual Empowerment|Spiritual Growth
Featured Image Alt Text: The King and the Hourglass
Short Description:
The young king thought he had forever.
Then the old counselor placed an hourglass before him — the upper chamber nearly empty — and spoke words that would haunt his reign:

“This is your time.”

In his urgency, the king built statues, commissioned songs, and filled the land with his image…
But when the last grain fell, the statues crumbled, the songs faded, and nothing lasting remained.

This timeless parable — drawn from ancient wisdom and retold with powerful modern insight — invites you to confront your own hourglass.

Inside these pages, you’ll discover:

  • Why the illusion of endless time keeps you from what matters most

  • How to build substance instead of decoration

  • The power of small, unseen moments to define your legacy

  • Practical principles for investing your life in what will endure

The King and the Hourglass is more than a story.
It’s a mirror, a warning, and a roadmap.
It will challenge you to stop living for applause, and start building for eternity.

The sand is falling. The time is now.
What will remain when your last grain falls?

Name: Crowns and Shadows: Ancient Wisdom for Modern Leaders
Category: Personal Growth & Confidence|Productivity & Purpose|Spiritual Empowerment|Spiritual Growth
Featured Image Alt Text: Crowns And Shadows
Short Description:
Every crown casts a shadow. Will you rule in the light — or be consumed in the dark?

For decades, Dr. Climate Wiseman has stood where few men ever stand — as a spiritual advisor to kings, business magnates, and decision-makers whose choices have shaped nations. He has been the watchman on the wall, the confidant in the midnight hour, the voice of truth when flattery filled the air. He has witnessed triumph and tragedy, loyalty and betrayal, destiny fulfilled and crowns lost to the shadows.

In Crowns and Shadows, Dr. Wiseman distills a lifetime of leadership counsel — lessons learned not only from the pages of history and scripture, but from the private chambers where the weight of power is truly felt. Each chapter is a timeless truth, forged in the fires of experience and sharpened by the rise and fall of those who wore the crown before you.

This is not a book of empty motivation. It is a field manual for rulers, decision-makers, and influencers — for anyone who carries responsibility over others. Here you will learn:

  • How to guard against the subtle temptations that destroy great leaders.

  • Why wisdom outlasts strength, and character outshines wealth.

  • The unchanging principles that protect a leader’s vision, team, and legacy.

  • How to lead with honor when the crown grows heavy and the shadows draw close.

Whether you lead a nation, a business, a ministry, or a household, the principles in these pages will challenge, correct, and equip you to rule well — not only in your time, but for generations to come.

Because the crown you wear today will one day rest on another’s head — and what you build in the light must endure long after your shadow fades.

Name: The Two Generals: Winning Today Is Not Enough—Lead for the Generations to Come
Category: Personal Growth & Confidence|Productivity & Purpose|Spiritual Empowerment|Spiritual Growth
Featured Image Alt Text: The Two Generals
Short Description:
When the invader came, both cities stood.
When the generals died, only one city lived.

This timeless parable, shared with the author by a great mentor, is more than an ancient tale—it is a mirror for every leader. Through the unfolding story of two commanders with very different visions, The Two Generals reveals the secrets of leaders who build beyond their lifetime.

One general prepared only for war.
The other prepared his people for life.

In these 24 powerful chapters, you will learn:

  • How to balance urgent battles with long-term growth.

  • Why protecting people is only half the mission.

  • The dangers of neglect, complacency, and leader-dependence.

  • How to plant, prepare, and pass the baton to future generations.

  • The principle of the long victory—success measured by what survives after you are gone.

Whether you lead a team, a business, a ministry, or a family, this book will challenge you to see beyond walls and into the future you are shaping.

Victory in a day means nothing if the people cannot live in the years to come.

Name: How I Sold Bikinis in the Desert: 24 Lessons in Selling What Shouldn’t Sell
Category: E-books|Finances|Financial Freedom & Success|Personal Growth & Confidence|Productivity & Purpose
Featured Image Alt Text: How I Sold Bikinis In The Desert
Short Description:
At sixteen, in Mtito-Andei, Kenya—far from any ocean—a boy opened a bale and found nothing but bikinis. Conservative town. Watchful eyes. Zero demand. Two weeks later, the bales were empty.

This is the true story of how a teenager turned the most impossible inventory into private joy for married homes—without breaking faith, family, or honor. Part memoir, part field guide, it reveals a quiet method for selling delicate things in careful places: whisper over shout, dignity over drama, systems over slogans.

Inside you’ll learn how to:

  • Turn objections into assignments (“no ocean” → “for the home”).

  • Make privacy your product—plain paper, ribbon inside, Friday exchanges.

  • Price for courage with starter steps and gentle bundles.

  • Seed stories that sell outcomes, not fabric (“Imagine tonight…”).

  • Borrow credibility (hello, sheikh), then build your own—silently.

From a dusty roadside stall to a blueprint you can use anywhere, these 24 lessons show how respect, ritual, and small sentences can move mountains—without raising your voice. If you lead, sell, serve, or simply need courage in a conservative room, this book will teach you how to carry bold ideas like bread: openly, calmly, and home.

Name: The Curse of Betrayal: Lessons from Ahithophel on Bitterness, Wisdom, and the Power of Forgiveness
Category: 30 Day Series|Emotional Healing & Resilience|Personal Growth & Confidence|Productivity & Purpose|Spiritual Empowerment|Spiritual Growth
Featured Image Alt Text: The Curse Of Betrayal
Short Description:
Betrayal cuts deeper than a knife.
It leaves you awake at night replaying conversations. It makes you question everyone around you. It poisons peace, steals joy, and whispers: “You’ll never trust again.”

But what if betrayal didn’t have to break you? What if the very thing meant to destroy you could become the soil of your greatest wisdom?

This is not just another book about hurt feelings. The Curse of Betrayal goes to the root of offense through the story of Ahithophel — the brilliant counselor whose bitterness ruined his destiny. His story is a prophetic warning, but also a roadmap for freedom.

Inside these pages, you will discover how to:

  • Recognize the hidden seeds of offense before they grow into destruction.

  • Discern the wrong voices that seek to sabotage your future.

  • Guard your heart without hardening it.

  • Turn betrayal into wisdom that strengthens your destiny.

  • Forgive without becoming a victim — and release the poison of bitterness forever.

This book is both a mirror and a manual. It combines biblical revelation, real-life testimonies, and step-by-step prophetic guidance to help you move from the sting of betrayal into the peace of forgiveness and the clarity of wisdom.

This book is for you if…

  • You have ever been betrayed by someone you trusted.

  • You struggle with replaying past hurts and can’t find closure.

  • You fear opening up again because of repeated disappointment.

  • You feel bitterness growing inside but long for freedom.

  • You want to walk in discernment, forgiveness, and unshakable peace.

You don’t have to live chained to betrayal. You don’t have to let offense write your story.

The Curse of Betrayal will help you break free, walk in wisdom, and leave a legacy of forgiveness instead of bitterness.

👉 The peace you’ve been longing for is within reach — are you ready to claim it?

Name: The Old Judge’s Wisdom:
Category: 30 Day Series|E-books|Personal Growth & Confidence|Productivity & Purpose|Spiritual Empowerment
Featured Image Alt Text: The Old Judge’s Wisdom
Short Description:
What if the greatest losses in life could have been avoided—not by strength, not by wealth, but by wisdom?

Many years ago, I sat with a retired district judge, a man who had seen the rise and fall of countless lives from the bench. In his trembling voice, he shared with me one truth: most men are not destroyed by what is done to them, but by how they choose to answer when their wrongs are exposed.

Drawing from his lifetime of judgments and from the words of Jesus in Matthew 5:25–26, this book opens a scroll of twenty-four timeless counsels. Each principle reveals why pride is too costly, why delay multiplies loss, and why reconciliation is always cheaper than ruin.

Through story, parable, and reflection, you will learn:

  • Why settling quickly saves more than money—it preserves freedom.

  • The three you can never lie to: God, the devil, and yourself.

  • How silence and humility can protect where argument and pride destroy.

  • Why half-measures often end in full ruin.

  • How forgiveness is also a settlement that frees the heart.

These are not the cold laws of a courtroom but living principles that guard destinies. The wisdom of the judge is no longer confined to a chamber or gavel—it is now placed in your hands.

This book is a mirror for every traveler on the road of life. In its pages you will discover how to avoid the prisons of pride, the debts of bitterness, and the costs of delay. Above all, you will be reminded: freedom is fragile, and the wisest path is to settle quickly, walk humbly, and guard it well.

Name: 30 Days to Overcome the Spirit of Pride: Break the Stronghold & Walk in Humble Authority
Category: 30 Day Series|Emotional Healing & Resilience|Personal Growth & Confidence|Productivity & Purpose|Spiritual Empowerment|Spiritual Growth
Featured Image Alt Text: 30 Days to Overcome the Spirit of Pride
Short Description:
Is pride quietly sabotaging your relationships, your leadership, and your peace?

You don’t have to be arrogant to struggle with pride. Sometimes it hides as defensiveness. Sometimes as comparison, control, or the silent need to prove yourself. Pride can make success hollow, destroy trust, and block the flow of grace — all while staying invisible to the one who carries it.

If you’ve ever felt misunderstood, isolated, or exhausted from keeping up appearances… you may already know pride’s quiet grip.

But there’s good news: it can be broken — in just 30 days.

A Practical, Step-by-Step Journey to True Freedom

International mentor and deliverance coach Dr. Climate Wiseman has spent over 25 years helping people around the world break destructive patterns, rebuild relationships, and step into their destiny with humility and strength. In this life-changing book, he guides you through 30 days of powerful self-reflection, heart work, and practical action to uproot pride and anchor your life in true humility — without losing healthy confidence.

Each day you’ll:

  • Learn how pride disguises itself and how to spot it early.

  • Practice proven heart-reset habits that break its grip.

  • Heal damaged relationships through apology, restitution, and trust-building.

  • Create your own Rule of Humility — a personal covenant to stay grounded even when success comes.

  • Walk boldly into your calling with a new foundation of peace, influence, and grace.

This book is for you if you…

  • Struggle with defensiveness or find it hard to receive correction.

  • Feel the need to prove your worth, control outcomes, or compete.

  • Have damaged relationships or lost trust because of ego or stubbornness.

  • Long to be promoted or successful without losing your soul.

  • Want to lead, love, and live from a place of strength under humility.

In just 30 focused days, you’ll move from silent self-protection to secure, unshakable humility — the kind that restores relationships, invites God’s favor, and makes success safe.

The stronghold of pride can end — and your journey to humble authority can begin today.

The peace and freedom you’ve been longing for are just 30 days away. Are you ready to embrace them?

Name: 30 Days to Protect Your Home from Spiritual Attack: Cleanse the Atmosphere, Evict Darkness, and Create a House of Glory
Featured Image Alt Text: 30 Days To Protect Your Home From Spiritual Attack
Short Description:
Does your house feel heavy — tense, fearful, or strangely unsettled — no matter how much you clean or pray?

You’re not imagining it.
Homes can carry invisible battles: anxiety that lingers in rooms, sudden strife between loved ones, financial drains, sleepless nights, or a subtle darkness that just won’t leave. Many live with this silent war every day, unsure how to fight back.

But your home was never meant to be a battleground. It was meant to be a sanctuary of peace, safety, and joy.

This 30-day journey will change everything.

With warmth and authority, renowned deliverance coach Dr. Climate Wiseman — who has helped thousands of families worldwide reclaim their homes — guides you step by step to:

  • Audit and cleanse every spiritual gateway in your house.

  • Close doors the enemy has used to invade your peace.

  • Fortify entry points — physical, digital, financial, and relational.

  • Reclaim lost time, joy, and provision through sevenfold restoration.

  • Build a lasting atmosphere of worship, unity, and divine protection.

Each day offers practical actions, emotional healing exercises, powerful prophetic declarations, and prayers that work — all designed to help you reclaim the spiritual climate of your home once and for all.

This book is for you if you…

  • Feel a strange heaviness, fear, or conflict in your home.

  • Battle constant setbacks, confusion, or financial drains tied to your house.

  • Long for restful sleep and peaceful nights free from nightmares.

  • Want to raise children in a safe, spiritually strong environment.

  • Desire to turn your house into a refuge filled with light, joy, and God’s presence.

  • Have tried to pray but feel you’re fighting something unseen and stubborn.

The peace you’ve been longing for is closer than you think.
In just 30 days, you can reclaim your home, restore your joy, and create a sanctuary that darkness cannot invade.

Your house can be more than four walls — it can be a House of Glory.
Are you ready to take it back?

Name: 30 Days to Manifest Good Luck: A Step By Step Guide To Invite Favor,Spot Opportunities, And Turn Chance Into Favor
Category: 30 Day Series|Personal Growth & Confidence|Productivity & Purpose|Spiritual Empowerment|Spiritual Growth
Featured Image Alt Text: 30 Days To Manifest Good Luck
Short Description:
Are you tired of feeling like luck is for everyone else but you?

You work hard. You plan. You pray. Yet doors seem to stay closed while others step into opportunity after opportunity. You watch people with fewer skills, less experience, or less effort get the breaks you’ve been waiting for. It’s exhausting. It’s discouraging. Sometimes it feels like life itself is passing you by.

But what if good luck isn’t random at all?
What if favor can be invited, multiplied, and sustained — and you could learn how in just 30 days?

30 Days to Manifest Good Luck is your practical and emotional roadmap to turn chance in your favor. Over this life-changing journey, Dr. Climate Wiseman — a seasoned mentor with over 25 years of helping thousands step into breakthrough — will show you how to reprogram your mindset, spot hidden opportunities, and move with courage when doors open.

Inside this book you’ll discover how to:

  • Rewire your thinking to attract favor instead of repel it.

  • Recognize subtle “luck cues” and openings others overlook.

  • Recover from past failures and reclaim lost opportunities.

  • Build meaningful connections that recommend you in unseen rooms.

  • Create simple systems so opportunity keeps finding you.

  • Live with gratitude, generosity, and confidence that invites ongoing breakthrough.

Each day includes transformative teaching, reflection prompts, clear action steps, empowering affirmations, global testimonies, and powerful prayer declarations — all designed to turn uncertainty into unstoppable momentum.

This book is for you if…

  • You feel overlooked while others seem effortlessly favored.

  • You’ve lost opportunities and want to recover and multiply them.

  • You’re tired of hustling without real breakthroughs.

  • You want practical steps — not just theory — to become “the person doors open for.”

  • You believe there’s more for your life and you’re ready to walk in it.

You don’t have to watch luck pass you by.
You can invite favor, attract help, and turn chance into breakthrough — one day at a time.

The life you’ve been waiting for is just 30 days away. Are you ready to step into it?

Name: Read Your Bible in One Year: A 52-Week Prophetic Journey Through the Word of God
Featured Image Alt Text: Read Your Bible In One Year
Short Description:
Experience the Bible as a Living Journey—Not Just a Reading Plan

Have you ever finished a year of Bible reading and still felt unchanged?
This guide will transform that routine into revelation.

In Read Your Bible in One Year, renowned Bible teacher Dr Climate Wiseman, M.Th. (Religious Philosophy), draws from over 30 years of teaching and prophetic ministry to help you encounter God through every chapter—from Genesis to Revelation.
Each of the 52 weekly sections combines structured reading, prophetic insight, reflection questions, declarations, and prayer activations that turn Scripture into daily power.

You’ll learn how to:

  • Read prophetically and hear the Holy Spirit’s voice in every book of the Bible.

  • Apply timeless truths to modern challenges.

  • Transform devotional reading into a lifestyle of revelation.

  • Live with the same Word-based authority that shaped prophets and apostles.

This is more than a schedule—it’s a year-long encounter with the Living Word.
If you stay the course, the Bible won’t just be a book you read; it will become the life you live.

About the Author

Dr Climate Wiseman is a seasoned Bible teacher and prophetic mentor with over three decades of ministry at The Kingdom Temple (London). Holding a Master’s degree in Religious Philosophy, he has witnessed the transforming power of God’s Word in thousands of lives worldwide. Through Wonderful Books International, he continues to equip believers to grow in revelation, discipline, and divine purpose.

Name: How to Flow in the Gifts of the Holy Spirit: Practical Training to Hear God, Prophesy, and Walk in Supernatural Partnership Every Day
Featured Image Alt Text: How To Flow In The Gifts Of The Spirit
Short Description:
How to Flow in the Gifts of the Holy Spirit
Practical Training to Hear God, Prophesy, and Walk in Supernatural Partnership Every Day

Have you ever wondered if God still speaks — and if you could hear Him clearly for your own life, family, work, or ministry?
Have you longed to move in spiritual gifts but felt unsure where to start or how to stay safe from error and abuse?

For more than twenty-five years, Dr Climate has walked in a trusted prophetic ministry that has impacted churches, businesses, and nations. In this practical guide he removes the mystery and fear surrounding the gifts of the Spirit, showing you how to experience God’s voice with clarity, confidence, and biblical safety.

Inside you’ll discover how to:

  • Understand and receive the gifts of the Holy Spirit for yourself.

  • Hear God’s voice clearly in everyday life and ministry.

  • Prophesy with accuracy and love, without hype or manipulation.

  • Test and discern prophetic words for truth and safety.

  • Steward revelation wisely through prayer, timing, and obedience.

  • Avoid common pitfalls such as pride, isolation, and control.

  • Bring the supernatural into your work, family, and city while staying grounded in Scripture.

Whether you’re hungry to grow in intimacy with the Holy Spirit, build a safe prophetic culture in your church, or simply learn how to use your gifts with maturity and integrity, this book will equip you to hear God and move in His power — every day.

It’s time to stop wondering and start flowing.

Name: 24 Ways to Grow the Fruit of the Spirit: Practical Steps to Cultivate Love, Joy, Peace and Christlike Character
Featured Image Alt Text: 24 Ways to Grow the Fruit of the Spirit
Short Description:
Most believers long to look like Jesus — loving, joyful, peaceful, patient, kind — yet often feel stuck, frustrated, or unchanged.
Spiritual gifts are exciting, but character is what sustains real power and lasting impact. The Bible calls it “the fruit of the Spirit” (Galatians 5:22–23) — and it is meant to grow in every follower of Christ.

24 Ways to Grow the Fruit of the Spirit is a step-by-step manual for Spirit-led transformation.
Across twenty-four practical, Scripture-anchored chapters you will learn how to:

  • Root your life in Christ so the Spirit can produce lasting change.

  • Develop love, joy, and peace as the unshakable core of your relationship with God.

  • Practice patience, kindness, and goodness in real-life relationships.

  • Build faithfulness, gentleness, and self-control so you can finish well and live free from condemnation.

  • Navigate pruning seasons and respond to God’s shaping without fear.

  • Live beyond guilt and performance — walking in grace, freedom, and authentic holiness.

With biblical insight, practical disciplines (fasting, accountability, daily choices), and real-life application, this book will help you move from occasional good intentions to a life overflowing with Christlike character.

If you’re ready to move beyond striving and finally grow a life that radiates love, joy, peace, and every other fruit of the Spirit — this guide will show you how.

It’s time to stop trying harder and start growing deeper.
Stay rooted in the Spirit and watch your life bloom.

Name: The Divine Genetic Order
Featured Image Alt Text: The Divine Genetic Order
Short Description:
Have you ever wondered why a zebra and a donkey can produce a zonkey…
but that zonkey will never produce offspring of its own?

Why a lion and a tiger can create a liger…
yet the liger stands as a biological dead end?

Why nature allows the first crossing,
but violently refuses the second?

Why does a zonkey exist —
yet can never continue its own line?

Why does every hybrid creation, no matter how majestic or impressive,
carry one undeniable mark… sterility?

Science calls it genetic incompatibility.
Biologists call it hybrid sterility.
But Scripture declared the answer long before laboratories discovered it:

“After its kind.”

In this groundbreaking book, Dr. Climate Wiseman unveils what modern science is only now beginning to confirm:
God designed creation with fixed boundaries, sacred identities, and unbreakable laws — and nothing man engineers can overturn them.

Through a stunning blend of biology, genetics, Scripture, and prophetic revelation, this 24-chapter exploration reveals:

• Why hybrid offspring can exist — but cannot reproduce
• Why nature enforces boundaries that scientists cannot override
• Why identity in creation is fixed, not fluid
• Why attempts to rewrite species lines always collapse
• How the “Divine Genetic Order” protects ecosystems, destinies, and generations
• Why sterility is not a biological accident, but a theological message

This is more than a scientific investigation.
It is a revelation of the Creator’s signature woven into DNA itself.

If you have ever been curious about the mysteries of species, the limits of genetic engineering, the prophetic meaning of hybrids, or the divine laws hidden within biology…

Prepare to discover what science could not explain
and what Scripture has always revealed.

Creation is not random.
Boundaries are not optional.
Identity is not negotiable.
And God’s design cannot be overthrown.

Name: 30 Days to Master Your Mind: A Step-by-Step Plan to Rewire Your Thinking for Success
Category: 30 Day Series|Deliverance & Spiritual Warfare|Emotional Healing & Resilience|Personal Growth & Confidence|Productivity & Purpose|Spiritual Empowerment|Spiritual Growth
Featured Image Alt Text: 30 Days To Master Your Mind
Short Description:
UNLOCK THE GENIUS WITHIN — MASTER YOUR MIND, TRANSFORM YOUR LIFE

Have you ever wondered why your mind feels overwhelmed, distracted, scattered—or stuck in cycles you can’t seem to break?
Have you ever sensed hidden potential inside you, yet felt blocked by frustration, confusion, or mental noise?

You’re not alone.
And you’re not broken.
Your mind was designed for brilliance—you simply haven’t learned how to access it… until now.

Every day, your thoughts shape your identity, your confidence, your relationships, and your destiny. When your inner world is chaotic, life feels chaotic. But when your mind becomes focused, empowered, and aligned—your entire life rises to meet that clarity.

This groundbreaking 30-day journey will show you how to silence mental clutter, break destructive patterns, activate inner intelligence, and rebuild your mind into a powerful engine of purpose, calm, and creativity.

Inside this book, you will discover:

  • How your mind actually works—and how to make it work for you

  • How to break negative thought loops that drain your energy

  • How to train your attention like a mind genius

  • How to master emotions instead of being ruled by them

  • How to build powerful habits that rewire your identity

  • How to think strategically, confidently, and clearly

  • How to become the calmest, strongest, and most intentional version of yourself

These teachings are not theory. They come from over 25 years of Dr. Climate Wiseman’s proven work in mental transformation, emotional healing, prophetic insight, and human behaviour—impacting thousands through mentoring, boot camps, one-on-one sessions, and global conferences.

By the time you complete this journey, you won’t just think differently.
You will live differently.
Focused. Confident. Emotionally stable. Powerful.
A mind genius—in your own unique design.

This Book Is for You If You…

  • Feel mentally exhausted, overwhelmed, or easily distracted

  • Struggle with negative thinking or self-doubt

  • Want more confidence, clarity, and emotional stability

  • Are tired of overthinking and want inner peace

  • Desire sharper focus and stronger decision-making skills

  • Want to unlock hidden potential and think like a high performer

  • Know you were made for more—but don’t know where to start

The transformation you’ve been waiting for is here.

Your clarity is waiting.
Your confidence is waiting.
Your breakthrough is waiting.

The genius-level mind you desire is only 30 days away—are you ready to step into it?

Name: The Man Who Forgot His Birthday: 24 Quiet Strengths of Men Who Measure Life by Impact, Not Dates
Featured Image Alt Text: The Man Who Forgot His Birthday
Short Description:
Some men don’t forget birthdays because they don’t care.
They forget because they were built differently.

I know—because I lived it.

I grew up in a world where birthdays weren’t celebrated, where dates were not the language of love, and where survival and progress mattered more than parties. So even as I became productive, focused, and successful, I kept finding myself misunderstood—especially by people who measured honor through rituals.

This book is not about shaming the man who forgets.
It’s about revealing the strength behind him.

The Man Who Forgot His Birthday is a blueprint for understanding “builder-minded” men—men who love through reliability, responsibility, provision, protection, and progress. You’ll discover how two languages of love collide, why people crave remembrance, and how honor can be expressed without performance.

Most importantly, you’ll learn how to turn misunderstanding into agreement, and how to honor deeply—without becoming someone else.

Because sometimes the greatest gift isn’t a party.
It’s a man whose life proves his heart.

  • Cleanse environments and consecrate your atmosphere

  • Commission your anointing for impact—not performance

  • Seal your oil with a covenant of purity, explainable boundaries, and lasting discipline

  • Feel spiritually tired, mentally foggy, or emotionally heavy without knowing why

  • Keep facing strange resistance, delays, misunderstandings, or repeated attacks

  • Want to protect your calling from lust, pride, offense, distraction, and burnout

  • Need a clear daily plan—not just encouragement—to preserve your oil

Name: The Discovery Map: A Step-by-Step Guide to Purpose, Destiny, Gifts, Anointing, and Influence
Category: 30 Day Series|E-books|Personal Growth & Confidence|Productivity & Purpose|Spiritual Empowerment
Featured Image Alt Text: The Discovery Map
Short Description:
What is my purpose… and what’s the difference between destiny, calling, gift, talent, anointing, and star?

If you’ve ever asked those questions—and still felt unsure—this book was written for you.

Because confusion is exhausting. It keeps you second-guessing yourself. It makes you start things and stop. It leaves you watching other people shine while you wonder, “What am I actually meant to do?” And the worst part is this: you may be gifted, passionate, and hungry for more—yet still feel stuck, overwhelmed, and spiritually restless.

The Discovery Map is your clear, step-by-step guide to finally separate what most people mix together. In simple language, you’ll learn what each layer really means—and how to know which one is operating in your life right now:

  • Purpose — your why

  • Destiny — your where over time

  • Calling/Assignment — your what now

  • Talent — what you can naturally learn and develop

  • Gift — what produces consistent impact when you use it

  • Anointing — spiritual empowerment and authority beyond skill

  • Star — visibility and influence (without losing yourself to it)

This is not theory. This is a practical map. You’ll walk through powerful clarity tools, personal audits, and “do not confuse” rules that protect you from distraction, comparison, and premature exposure. You won’t just feel inspired—you’ll know what to do next.

By the time you finish, you won’t be guessing anymore. You’ll have peace in your identity, confidence in your direction, and a real plan for the season you are in.

This book is for you if…

  • You keep asking, “What am I really called to do?” but you can’t put it into words.

  • You feel gifted, but you don’t know if it’s talent, gift, or anointing.

  • You’ve confused star (visibility) with destiny (direction) and it has made you anxious.

  • You’re tired of starting and stopping, and you want a clear path forward.

  • You want to discover your lane without pressure, hype, or complicated language.

  • You’re ready to stop living in confusion and start living with focus.

You don’t need more noise. You need a map.

The peace you’ve been longing for is closer than you think—are you ready to embrace it?

Name: 30 Days to Break Inherited Bondage: Cancel the Evil Inheritance Fighting Your Life
Category: 30 Day Series|Deliverance & Spiritual Warfare|Spiritual Empowerment|Spiritual Growth
Featured Image Alt Text: 30 Days To Break Inherited Bondage
Short Description:
You didn’t choose your bloodline… but you can choose what ends with you.

Have you ever looked at your life and wondered why the same battles keep repeating—no matter how hard you pray, work, or try to change?
Sudden losses. Mysterious setbacks. Business collapse. Sickness that returns. Relationships that break the same way. Opportunities that slip through your hands at the last minute.
It’s exhausting. It’s confusing. And if you’re honest, it can feel hopeless—like something unseen is fighting your future.

30 Days to Break Inherited Bondage was written for this exact war.

This is not a “feel good” book. It’s a step-by-step freedom blueprint to help you identify generational patterns, cancel hidden agreements, close spiritual doors, and establish a new inheritance of peace, stability, favor, and lasting breakthrough. Day by day, you’ll learn how to separate what is yours from what is inherited, dismantle the unseen systems feeding the cycle, and rebuild your life with spiritual government and practical structure—so freedom doesn’t just happen… it stays.

You won’t just feel inspired. You’ll feel equipped.

This book is for you if you…

  • Keep seeing repeated setbacks that don’t match your effort

  • Have a family history of premature death, sickness cycles, or strange loss

  • Experience sudden business collapse or “almost there” frustration

  • Feel like there’s a hidden pattern of court trouble, accidents, or shame

  • Suspect your family was touched by occult covenants, corrupt wealth exchanges, or dark dedications

  • Are tired of surviving—and ready to build a blessed bloodline that your children won’t have to fight to inherit

Inside, you’ll find powerful teaching, guided journal prompts, practical action steps, affirmations, real-life testimonies, targeted prayer focus, prophetic declarations, and warfare prayer points—designed to take you from confusion to clarity, from bondage to boundaries, and from repeated collapse to stable progress.

You were not born to be a prisoner of your lineage.

The peace you’ve been longing for is just 30 days away—are you ready to embrace it?

If you’ve ever carried a sentence from a parent that still echoes in your mind—“You’ll never make it… You’re a failure… You’ll suffer like me… Nothing good lasts for you…”—then you already know the truth: parental words can become chains, and family pain can become a pattern.

But it doesn’t have to stay that way.

30 Days to Break Parental Curses is a step-by-step deliverance and restoration guide designed to help you reverse the words and actions spoken by mother or father figures that have limited your peace, confidence, relationships, finances, health, and destiny. You will learn how to identify the exact verdicts that shaped your life, cancel the hidden agreements that empowered them, and rebuild a new future with clarity and strength.

This isn’t hype. This is a pathway.

In 30 days, you’ll begin to experience what many thought was impossible: peace that stays, confidence that rises, emotional freedom, and a new spiritual atmosphere around your life and family. Each day walks you through practical, actionable steps—combining deliverance-focused teaching, guided reflection, clear action points, targeted prayer, and prophetic declarations—so you don’t just feel inspired… you actually change.

This book is for you if you…

  • Feel trapped by rejection, shame, fear, or “never enough” thoughts you didn’t create

  • Keep repeating the same cycles—delay, failure, broken relationships, instability—and you don’t know why

  • Struggle with an “inner voice” that replays parental criticism, blame, or humiliation

  • Grew up under harshness, favoritism, abandonment, manipulation, or spiritual intimidation

  • Want to stop negative patterns from passing to your children and build a new family legacy

  • Are ready to break free without bitterness—while establishing wise boundaries and lasting healing

You are not doomed. You are not late. And you are not disqualified.
You are simply ready to be free.

The peace you’ve been longing for is just 30 days away—are you ready to embrace it?

  • You feel like you’re under unexplainable pressure, even though you love God

  • Your life keeps repeating cycles of delay, collapse, and near-breakthrough frustration

  • You suspect hidden spiritual warfare but refuse to live in paranoia or fear

Name: 30 Days To Manifest Forgiveness: Release the Debt, Heal the Heart, Restore Your Sight
Category: Emotional Healing & Resilience|Relationships & Social Success|Spiritual Empowerment|Spiritual Growth
Short Description:
Forgiveness shouldn’t feel like a life sentence to pain.

Yet when you’ve been betrayed, used, lied to, abandoned, or repeatedly disrespected, your heart can become a battlefield. You try to “move on,” but the memories keep replaying. You set boundaries, but guilt pulls you back. You pray, but the heaviness returns. Deep down, you know you’re not only fighting what happened—you’re fighting what it did inside you.

30 Days To Manifest Forgiveness is your step-by-step path out of that prison.

This is not a book that tells you to excuse people, trust blindly, or reconcile with unsafe relationships. It teaches you something powerful and freeing: forgiveness is heart-release, not relationship access. You will learn how to forgive without reopening doors, how to break spiritual ties without returning, and how to stay free long-term—without bitterness, without rumination, and without losing your discernment.

In 30 focused days, you will be guided to:

  • release resentment without denying your pain

  • stop mental replays and inner arguments

  • break guilt-driven cycles and emotional manipulation

  • rebuild calm discernment and clear interpretation

  • forgive repeat offenders with wisdom and justice

  • establish holy boundaries that protect your peace

  • seal a forgiveness lifestyle that keeps you free, clear, and protected

Each day includes powerful teaching, targeted journal prompts, action steps, affirmations, real-life testimonies, scripture + prayer focus, plus 12 prophetic declarations and 12 prayer points to strengthen your spirit and keep your deliverance permanent.

This book is for you if you…

  • keep replaying what they did and can’t “switch it off”

  • feel angry, heavy, guarded, or emotionally drained

  • struggle to forgive yourself and keep punishing your own heart

  • keep reconciling too soon and getting hurt again

  • feel trapped between “boundaries” and “being a good person”

  • want peace, but you refuse to be naive

  • are ready to forgive fully—and finally live free

You don’t have to carry this weight another year.

You can be kind without being accessible. You can forgive without forgetting wisdom. You can bless without returning. And you can live with a heart that is clean, a mind that is clear, and a life that is protected.

The peace you’ve been longing for is just 30 days away—are you ready to embrace it?

Name: 20 Traits of Self-Made Millionaires: The Habits, Mindsets, and Decisions That Turn Effort Into Prosperity
Featured Image Alt Text: 20 Traits Of Self-Made Millionaires
Short Description:
Why do some people build lasting wealth while others work hard for years and still struggle to get ahead?

The difference is often found in their habits, mindsets, choices, and way of thinking.

In 20 Traits of Self-Made Millionaires, you will discover the essential qualities that repeatedly appear in the lives of people who rise from ordinary beginnings to build extraordinary prosperity. From strong purpose and extreme discipline to financial literacy, strategic thinking, resilience, asset-building, and value creation, this book reveals the inner pattern behind real success.

These are not empty theories. These are traits that shape how wealth-builders think, act, recover, grow, and create impact over time.

Inside this powerful guide, you will learn how to:

Think long-term instead of living only for the moment
Build discipline that strengthens your future
Recognize opportunities others overlook
Develop the confidence to take wise action
Create value that attracts reward
Build assets, protect time, and multiply your results

This book will challenge you to stop admiring success from a distance and start developing the qualities that make success possible.

Because wealth is rarely built by accident. It is usually built by people who learn how to think better, act wiser, and create greater value over time.

If you are ready to turn effort into prosperity, this book will help you begin.

From trading time only for money, to lifestyle inflation, poor financial advice, weak networks, underpricing your value, and failing to think like an owner—this book shines a bright light on the habits, beliefs, and decisions that block prosperity.

But this is not a book of condemnation.
It is a book of awakening.
A book of clarity.
A book of strategy.
A book of hope.

Inside these pages, you will discover how to:

  • identify the financial patterns keeping you stuck

  • break free from destructive money habits

  • shift from survival thinking to wealth-building thinking

  • develop high-value skills that increase earning power

  • build assets, leverage, and ownership

  • make wiser long-term decisions with confidence

  • position yourself for lasting prosperity instead of temporary relief

Each chapter is designed to help you move step by step from confusion to clarity, from frustration to strategy, and from hard work alone to intentional wealth creation.

You do not need to stay trapped in cycles of stress, debt, delay, and financial disappointment.
You do not need to keep working hard without understanding why progress feels slow.
You do not need to remain where you are.

This book will help you think differently, act differently, and build differently.

  • work hard but still feel financially stuck

  • earn money but struggle to keep or grow it

  • want to build wealth but do not know what is holding you back

  • are tired of surviving and ready to start building

  • want practical, honest, life-changing financial wisdom

  • know you were created for more than paycheck-to-paycheck living

  • are ready to break old patterns and create a stronger future

Written with clarity, empathy, and powerful practical insight, this book will help you stop guessing and start building the life you truly want.

You have worked hard long enough. Now it is time to work wiser.

Name: The Seed: Understanding Offering, Sacrifice, and the Covenant Power of What You Bring to God

What if your giving has been sincere, but not properly understood?

In The Seed, Bishop Climate reveals a powerful covenant truth that has transformed lives, opened doors, broken cycles, and produced visible testimonies across generations: what you bring before God matters, how you bring it matters, and understanding it changes everything.

This book takes you deep into the spiritual mystery of seed, offering, sacrifice, alms, kingdom support, honor, prophetic connection, and good ground. With bold teaching, prophetic authority, real ministry insight, and life-changing testimonies, Bishop Climate shows how faith-filled giving can become more than a religious act—it can become a voice speaking into your future.

• How to sow for healing, wisdom, houses, land, property, and financial breakthrough

• Why your seed can go ahead of you and speak before you arrive

If you are ready to move from casual giving to covenant precision, from confusion to clarity, and from silent hope to speaking seed, then this book will change the way you see faith forever.

Your seed is not dead.
Your future is not empty.
And what you place before God in faith can still speak.

Name: The Art Of War For Politics: A Modern Manual On Political Strategy
Category: Personal Growth & Confidence|Productivity & Purpose|Relationships & Social Success
Featured Image Alt Text: The Art Of War
Short Description:
Politics is not won by noise. It is won by strategy.

In The Art of War for Politics, power strategist, adviser, mentor, and systems builder Dr. Wiseman reveals what separates candidates who merely campaign from candidates who actually win. Drawing from over 30 years of experience across politics, business, crisis management, scandal response, leadership strategy, and public influence, this book breaks down the real battlefield of modern elections.

This is not a book of slogans. It is a field manual for serious political leadership.

Inside, you will discover how to:

  • read the mind of the voter
  • build the right campaign machine
  • master message, narrative, and perception
  • use timing as political power
  • manage alliances, attacks, and counterattacks
  • survive smear campaigns and internal sabotage
  • turn momentum into turnout
  • protect the vote and operate with discipline on Election Day
  • win power without losing legitimacy after victory

Dr. Wiseman also brings practical insight from the world of political technology as founder of BClimax Technologies Limited and creator of CampaignsCommandCentre.com, a powerful campaign command system designed to help candidates and political teams manage people, intelligence, field operations, messaging, and strategy with real precision.

Whether you are a candidate, adviser, strategist, mobilizer, or future leader, this book will show you one hard truth: elections are not won by chance. They are won by those who prepare before the crowd arrives, think before the opponent moves, and organize before the pressure comes.

If you want to understand how real political victory is built — before Election Day — this book is your blueprint.
